question_variants: What are you most proud of?
Tell us about your proudest accomplishment
question_bank.answer: At Example Corp I built a reporting pipeline from scratch that cut manual data-validation work by 80%, with no prior playbook or dedicated team — just a problem I noticed and decided to fix.

question_variants: Why do you want to work here?
Why are you interested in this role?
question_bank.answer: I've spent my career in [FIELD], and [COMPANY] is tackling [PROBLEM] — a problem I want to be close to. The mandate of this role matches how I've operated throughout my career: high ownership, cross-functional, and close to leadership.
